sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:30:45');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datepart('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
